    "info": {
        "title": "OpsServer API",

        "contact": { "name": "OpsServer Support", "email": "support@opsserver.local" },
        "license": { "name": "MIT", "url": "https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT" },
        "version": "1.0"
    },
    "host": "{{.Host}}",
    "basePath": "{{.BasePath}}",
    "securityDefinitions": {
        "BearerAuth": {
            "type": "apiKey",
            "name": "Authorization",
            "in": "header",
